arts.ttl: Newcastle to rival Wolves for transfer of Liverpool forward
arts.sum: Diogo Jota is a summer transfer target for Newcastle United and Wolves with the forward expected to leave Liverpool. Jota has been plagued by fitness injuries across the last three seasons and Liverpool are prepared to offload the Portugal international in the summer. Premier League rivals are monitoring his situation, with former club Wolves among […] The post Newcastle to rival Wolves for transfer of Liverpool forward first appeared on The Football Faithful.
